style: Painted RPG card-art with ornate gold curved frame, dark green-black moody vignette background, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, oil painting texture. Match for existing portraits like brabant-prins.png, belgen-frietkoning.png, limburg-mijnbaas.png.
purpose: Research-button icons in Smederij/LumberCamp/UpgradeBuilding panels for Reign of Brabant.
